question: Which statement about the internet penetration data shown on the map is correct?

options.A: Brazil has a higher internet penetration rate than countries shown in gray.
options.B: Countries shown in gray have the lowest internet penetration rates on the map.
options.C: Countries shown in gray represent missing data and their internet penetration rates cannot be compared with others.
options.D: All countries on the map have reported internet penetration data.

explanation: China and South Africa both have measured data, so we can compare them numerically. China is 97.1% vs 41.0% for South Africa.
